title: NHKマイルカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle's heart races with excitement as she
sets her sights on the high-octane G1 racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on scoring a big win and enjoying a
challenging competition against such powerful
opponents...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle dashes toward the venue!
